stage.s1.name: Topic & Goal Definition
stage.s2.name: Data Requirement Analysis
stage.s3.name: Data Loading & Validation
stage.s4.name: Data Analysis
stage.s5.name: Report Generation
stage.s6.name: PPT Generation
gate.confirm_prompt: Enter 'confirm' to proceed, or describe your revision:

error.already_completed: Stage {stage_id} is already completed and cannot be revisited.
error.git_not_repo: Not a git repository, skipping auto-commit.
error.web_fetch_unavailable: Web Fetch is not available (JINA_API_KEY not set).
error.code_exec_timeout: Code execution timed out after {timeout} seconds.
s5.remind_open_report: Report generated at {path}. Please open and review it.
s5.remind_edit_or_chat: You can edit the file directly, or describe changes here.
s5.report_confirmed: Report content confirmed. Proceeding to PPT generation.
orchestrator.already_complete: Pipeline already complete, nothing to run.
cli.no_project_found: No project found. Run 'anappt init' first.
cli.confirm_or_revise: Enter 'confirm' to accept, or type revision feedback:
cli.no_config: No model config found, using defaults.
cli.config.project_models_ignored: Project-level config {path} is no longer read; please migrate its contents to ~/.anappt/models.yaml
setup.node_missing: ✗ Node.js not detected. Please install Node.js >= 20: https://nodejs.org/
setup.npm_missing: ✗ npm not detected. Please install via Node.js installer
setup.chrome_missing_warning: ⚠ No Chrome/Chromium/Edge detected. PPTX/PDF export will be unavailable (HTML generation unaffected). Set CHROME_PATH env var to specify
interactive.exit_prompt: Type 'exit' to quit, or enter a command:
interactive.help_text: Available commands: status, config, reset, exit, confirm
agent.max_iterations: Max iterations reached without final answer.
s1.goal: Collect topic/motivation/audience/objectives/success-criteria/delivery via conversation; produce report.yaml and s1_topic.md
s2.goal: Derive the data requirement list needed to complete the analysis from report.yaml; produce .anappt/s2_data_requirement.md
s3.goal: Load data, generate a data profile, check coverage against the S2 requirement, and write .anappt/s3_data_profile.md
s4.goal: Iteratively perform deep analysis and produce .anappt/s4_analysis_report.md; support multiple rounds of user feedback
s5.goal: Organize analysis conclusions into a deliverable report with standard structure; produce output/final_report.md
s6.goal: Build output/ppt/goal.json from final_report.md + report.yaml and render presentation.html
s6.skill_not_installed: ✗ dashi-ppt-skill is not installed. Please run 'anappt setup' to install it first
s6.loading_skill_md: Loading SKILL.md as LLM system prompt...
s6.theme_selection_prompt: Show the user 12 themes (theme01-theme12) and ask for selection. Output format: number + theme name + brief description
s6.selecting_theme_pack: Enter the selected theme pack (e.g., theme03):
s6.preview_url: PPT generated. Please open {url} in your browser to edit and confirm, then return to CLI and type 'confirm'
s6.skill_md_not_found: SKILL.md not found at {path}. Please run 'anappt setup' to reinstall
s6.goal_json_parse_failed: Failed to parse goal.json from LLM: {error}
cli.new_skill_downloading: Downloading dashi-ppt-skill (~100MB, first install takes 1-3 minutes)...
cli.new_skill_env_not_met: ⚠ Environment not met ({reason}). Please run 'anappt setup' later to install dashi-ppt-skill
cli.new_skill_download_failed: ⚠ dashi-ppt-skill download failed: {error}. Please run 'anappt setup' later to retry
cli.new_skill_skipped: Skipped dashi-ppt-skill download (--no-skill). Please run 'anappt setup' later to install
cli.already_anappt_project: Current directory is already an anappt project: {path}
cli.in_place_initialized: Current directory initialized as an anappt project: {path}
conv.opening_instruction: Based on the current stage progress and project memory, generate an opening prompt: analyze progress and indicate the next step.
conv.opening_instruction_interactive: Based on all stage progress, project memory, recent session history index and current artifacts, self-identify what the user needs to do now and generate an opening prompt.
conv.not_ready: Current stage artifacts are not ready. Cannot confirm. Please complete the artifacts as instructed by the LLM first.
conv.help_text: Meta-commands: confirm (advance) / status (show status) / memory (show memory) / help (help) / exit (quit). Other input goes to the LLM as conversation.
conv.unknown_meta: Unknown meta-command: {cmd}. Type help for available commands.
